LightningComponentBundle.description: Displays a single VolunteerShift__c record as a card with optional sign-up action. SLDS 2 + Dark Mode compliant.

property.name: shiftId
property.label: Volunteer Shift Record Id
property.description: The 18-character Id of the VolunteerShift__c record to display.

property.name: allowSignup
property.label: Allow Sign Up
property.description: Show the Sign Up button when capacity remains.
